final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-fantasy
Asset type: editorial illustration, storybook spread
Primary request: dreamlike underwater fairy-tale world with mermaid, glowing jellyfish, sunken treasure, and light rays
Scene/backdrop: coral reef kingdom, ancient shipwreck with scattered gold coins and jewels, bioluminescent sea creatures
Subject: graceful mermaid with flowing hair swimming among coral formations, translucent jellyfish emitting soft glow, weathered shipwreck with treasure chest
Style/medium: whimsical storybook illustration, watercolor-digital hybrid, fantasy art
Composition/framing: wide underwater scene, eye-level perspective with depth layers
Lighting/mood: golden sunbeams piercing through water surface, dappled caustic light, magical and ethereal atmosphere
Color palette: iridescent teals and aquas, coral pinks and oranges, gold treasure accents, bioluminescent purples and blues
Materials/textures: translucent jellyfish bells, rough barnacle-covered ship wood, smooth pearl surfaces, flowing mermaid hair
Constraints: keep the dreamlike fairy-tale quality, ensure mermaid is central focal point
Avoid: realistic horror elements, cluttered composition, muddy colors, photorealistic rendering
